overall.description: A first-person walk through a post-apocalyptic desert solar farm in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), with abandoned solar panel canopies lining both sides of a dirt path. Vehicles occasionally pass on the adjacent paved road while the camera moves steadily toward a distant billboard and mountain launch facility.

events.description: green sports car passes from right to left on the paved road
white sedan approaches from the distance and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder parallel to the paved road, moving between rows of abandoned solar canopies

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past on the paved road, moving away from camera

entered.detail: rows of abandoned industrial solar panel canopies with angled roofs extending into the distance
sandy dirt trail running parallel to the paved road through the desert
asphalt road with vehicles passing by, separating the dirt path from the solar canopies
sparse dry bushes and tumbleweeds growing between the dirt path and solar structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate desert solar farm with rows of abandoned canopy structures lining both sides of a dirt path. The camera walks steadily forward along the dirt shoulder as a green sports car speeds past on the adjacent paved road. Sparse desert vegetation dots the sandy ground under harsh midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: solar farm corridor with yucca plants

events.description: yucca plants become prominent on the left side of the dirt path
black sedan overtakes from behind and passes on the right
large billboard becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path, passing yucca plants while observing vehicles on the road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the camera position on the paved road

entered.detail: tall spiky desert yucca plants growing alongside the dirt path
distant mountain with a large launch tower emitting a bright vertical light beam
large blank rectangular billboard standing beside the road in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the solar farm corridor, the camera passes prominent yucca plants on the left while vehicles continue to pass on the right. A massive launch tower with a light beam becomes visible on the distant mountain, and a large billboard emerges on the horizon ahead. The solar canopies now loom closer on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching billboard in desert solar farm

events.description: green car passes from right to left, followed by other vehicles
camera passes the large billboard, revealing more open desert beyond

agents.ego_description: walking past the billboard sign while maintaining pace along the dirt shoulder, observing the distant launch facility

notable_agents.action: green car driving away from camera down the paved road

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches and passes the large billboard, revealing more of the open desert landscape ahead. The solar canopies begin to recede into the distance on the right while the launch tower structure remains visible on the left horizon. Vehicles continue to sporadically pass on the road as the dirt path stretches toward the distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate desert solar farm that gradually opens into a vast mountain vista. It begins on a sandy dirt shoulder lined with abandoned canopy structures, moving steadily forward as a green sports car speeds past on an adjacent paved road under a harsh midday sun. As the camera pushes deeper into the corridor, it passes prominent yucca plants while a massive launch tower with a light beam and a large billboard emerge on the distant horizon. The scene then expands as the camera approaches and passes the billboard, causing the solar canopies to recede to the right. Finally, the path stretches toward the distant mountains, leaving the launch tower visible on the left horizon as vehicles continue to sporadically pass on the road.
